title: thymus acinos var. incanotomentosus
intro: Thymus acinos var. incanotomentosus, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, creeping perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils, which exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with T. acinos var. incanotomentosus include its ability to support respiratory health, alleviate coughs and colds, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, T. acinos var. incanotomentosus is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
